---
title: "Past years"
---

Browse schedules from every course offering. The current term's live plan is on the
[Syllabus](syllabus.qmd) page.

<!-- BEGIN AUTO-GENERATED ARCHIVE -->
<details>
<summary><strong>Fall 2025 (2025-10-21 – 2026-01-27)</strong></summary>

| Week | Date | Topic | Blog post | Slides | Class assignment | Home assignment | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | 2025-10-21 | Reconstruction attacks | [Reconstruction Attacks](../content/blog-posts/reconstruction-attacks/post.html) | [Reconstruction Attacks](../content/lecture-presentations/reconstruction-attacks/presentation.html) | — | — | — |
| 2 | 2025-10-28 | DP as hypothesis testing | [DP as Hypothesis Testing](../content/blog-posts/hypothesis-testing/post.html) | [DP as Hypothesis Testing](../content/lecture-presentations/hypothesis-testing/presentation.html) | — | — | — |
| 3 | 2025-11-04 | Reading week | — | — | — | — | No class |

</details>

<details>
<summary><strong>Fall 2026 (2026-10-20 – 2027-01-26) — current</strong></summary>

| Week | Date | Topic | Blog post | Slides | Class assignment | Home assignment | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | 2026-10-20 | K-anonymity | — | — | — | — | — |
| 2 | 2026-10-27 | Reconstruction attacks | [Reconstruction Attacks](../content/blog-posts/reconstruction-attacks/post.html) · [![Open in Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/applied-dp-course/website/blob/main/content/blog-posts/reconstruction-attacks/post.ipynb) | [Reconstruction Attacks](../content/lecture-presentations/reconstruction-attacks/presentation.html) | — | — | — |
| 3 | 2026-11-03 | DP as hypothesis testing | [DP as Hypothesis Testing](../content/blog-posts/hypothesis-testing/post.html) · [![Open in Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/applied-dp-course/website/blob/main/content/blog-posts/hypothesis-testing/post.ipynb) | [DP as Hypothesis Testing](../content/lecture-presentations/hypothesis-testing/presentation.html) | [Hypothesis Testing Assignment](../content/class-assignments/hypothesis-testing/assignment.html) · [![Open in Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/applied-dp-course/website/blob/main/content/class-assignments/hypothesis-testing/assignment.ipynb) | — | — |
| 4 | 2026-11-10 | Privacy auditing | [Privacy Auditing](../content/blog-posts/privacy-auditing/post.html) · [![Open in Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/applied-dp-course/website/blob/main/content/blog-posts/privacy-auditing/post.ipynb) | [Privacy Auditing](../content/lecture-presentations/privacy-auditing/presentation.html) | — | — | — |
| 5 | 2026-11-17 | Private estimation | [Private Estimation](../content/blog-posts/private-estimation/post.html) · [![Open in Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/applied-dp-course/website/blob/main/content/blog-posts/private-estimation/post.ipynb) | [Private Estimation](../content/lecture-presentations/private-estimation/presentation.html) | — | — | — |
| 6 | 2026-11-24 | Private Estimation - cont | [Private Estimation - cont](../content/blog-posts/private-subgroup-comparisons/post.html) · [![Open in Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/applied-dp-course/website/blob/main/content/blog-posts/private-subgroup-comparisons/post.ipynb) | [Private Estimation - cont](../content/lecture-presentations/private-subgroup-comparisons/presentation.html) | — | — | — |

</details>
<!-- END AUTO-GENERATED ARCHIVE -->
